name: Tartufo
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cherries in rum.
2. Sift 1 cup of sugar, cocoa, and 2 teaspoons of instant coffee into a heavy saucepan.
3. Add 1/3 cup of water to the dry ingredients and stir well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Cook until everything is well mixed.
6. In a separate bowl, whip the egg yolks with sugar until light and fluffy.
7. Gradually add the hot syrup into the yolk mixture while stirring at a low speed.
8. Continue beating until the mixture forms ribbon-like peaks.
9. Chill the mixture thoroughly.
10. Whisk 2 tablespoons of rum into the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
11. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
12. Add the chopped chocolate and stir until combined.
13. Line a muffin pan with foil.
14. Fill each cup about 1/3 full with the chocolate mixture.
15. Place a cherry in each cup, then fill the rest of the way with the mixture.
16. Freeze for at least 4 hours before serving.
17. Pipe whipped cream on top if desired. The tartufo will keep in the freezer for about a month.
